expectations.evidence: Agent wrote PNGs to results/models/, not an HTML report to results/reports/
Generated report_roc_multiclass.png to results/models/ (wrong location, different name)

expectations.text: Response mentions all 6 models: SVM, RF, ExtraTrees, GBM, Ensemble, CNN

expectations.text: Response includes specific AUC scores (numbers like 0.9xx)
expectations.evidence: AUC values computed and reported (CNN 0.9776, etc.)

expectations.text: Response tells user where the HTML report is saved
expectations.evidence: No HTML report generated; agent pointed to PNG files instead
